problem: The heartbeat integrity loop currently calls `mc_command --json`, but on this host that binary is not guaranteed in PATH (`zsh: command not found: mc_command`). This creates false-negative monitoring blind spots: integrity checks silently fail to execute even when market pipeline health may have degraded.

evidence.impact: Periodic integrity checks can fail before evaluating `spot_integrity.ok`, `mc_provenance.source_stale`, and `mc_provenance.counts_consistent`, reducing reliability of trade-readiness safeguards.

required_change: Define and enforce one canonical heartbeat command path for MC JSON (prefer explicit script invocation, e.g., `python3 scripts/mc_command.py --json`, not PATH-dependent alias).

Add a preflight command-resolution guard in the heartbeat runner: if canonical command is unavailable, emit a structured `HEARTBEAT_CHECK_FAILED` payload with reason `mc_command_unavailable` (not a generic shell error).
Update HEARTBEAT.md instructions to the canonical command so human/agent checks stay consistent.
Add telemetry counter `heartbeat_mc_command_unavailable_total` and include last failure timestamp for observability.
acceptance_tests: Unit test: when PATH lacks `mc_command`, heartbeat still executes successfully via canonical explicit command and returns parseable JSON.

Unit test: when canonical command target is intentionally missing, heartbeat returns structured failure payload with `reason=mc_command_unavailable` and increments `heartbeat_mc_command_unavailable_total`.

Integration test: run heartbeat check end-to-end on a clean shell env (`PATH` without local wrappers) and verify required fields (`spot_integrity.ok`, `mc_provenance.source_stale`, `mc_provenance.counts_consistent`) are evaluated or explicit structured failure is emitted.
Regression test: no raw `command not found` text leaks to user-facing watchdog alerts; alerts use normalized reason code + remediation hint.
constraints: Do not relax current fail-closed behavior for integrity/watchdog decisions.
Keep existing mc_command JSON schema contract unchanged for downstream consumers.
Changes must be additive and backward compatible for existing heartbeat automation.
